todayMoves.title: Package the 3-tier offer ladder
todayMoves.outcome: Every prospect can be routed to a clear Launch, Growth, or Command offer without custom pricing confusion.
actions: Use the $3k Launch Site for fast trust-building projects.
Use the $5k Growth Site when the business has leads but weak capture/follow-up.
Use the $10k AI Front Desk when missed calls, intake, or booking friction is obvious.
todayMoves.proof: Offer ladder is now embedded in Command Center under Offers.

todayMoves.title: Run the medspa wedge campaign
todayMoves.outcome: Send high-specificity messages to Boca medspas using consult capture, AI concierge, and premium treatment funnel angles.
actions: Start with Glamor Medical, Better Me Medical Spa, Elite Medical SPA, and Boca Med Spa.
Attach the medspa demo/close-room where relevant.
Ask for permission to send a 60-second preview, not for a meeting first.
todayMoves.proof: Medspa campaign pack includes pain signals, hooks, audit points, and follow-up plan.

todayMoves.title: Send 10 precision first touches
todayMoves.outcome: Start real conversations without pretending results exist yet.
actions: Use the Outreach Vault's short DM opener first.
If they respond, send close room/demo link.
Log status manually in the War Room until a CRM backend exists.
todayMoves.proof: Outreach scripts are ready by vertical and channel.

todayMoves.title: Create one vertical-specific Loom audit
todayMoves.outcome: A reusable audit video style that can be copied for medspas/dental/home services.
actions: Use the Client Audit Generator checklist.
End with: I built a quick preview if you want to see it.
todayMoves.proof: Audit script and checklist live in Command Center.

todayMoves.title: Post today's Stratos content asset
todayMoves.outcome: Ship one polished post from the V2 pack with a caption that speaks to outdated intake/follow-up.
actions: Use the Instagram Dispatcher cron output if available.
Pair visual with a non-generic operator caption.
Invite businesses to DM 'front desk' for a quick audit.
todayMoves.proof: Repurposing engine includes post, email, LinkedIn, X, and reel variants.

todayMoves.title: Add one demo case study to outbound
todayMoves.outcome: Use transparent projected/demo case studies to explain value without fake client claims.
actions: Pick medspa as the first demo case study.
Use before/after workflow language instead of fake metrics.
todayMoves.proof: Case study templates are embedded and transparent.

offerLadder.name: Launch Site
offerLadder.bestFor: A local business with an outdated website that needs instant trust and conversion basics.
offerLadder.promise: A premium, fast, mobile-first website that makes the business look current and easier to contact.
offerLadder.salesLine: This is the trust rebuild: make the first impression match the quality of the service.
offerLadder.upsell: Growth Site when they want capture, follow-up, and content systems.

offerLadder.name: Growth Site
offerLadder.bestFor: A business already getting traffic, DMs, calls, or referrals but leaking leads after the first click.
offerLadder.promise: Website plus lead capture and follow-up so more interest turns into booked conversations.
offerLadder.salesLine: This is where your site stops acting like a brochure and starts acting like a sales assistant.
offerLadder.upsell: AI Front Desk when missed calls/intake are costing real money.

offerLadder.name: AI Front Desk
offerLadder.bestFor: High-value businesses where one missed consult, emergency job, case, or new patient is expensive.
offerLadder.promise: AI-assisted booking, intake, and follow-up that responds when staff is busy or the office is closed.
offerLadder.salesLine: This is a front desk that never ignores a lead, even after hours.
offerLadder.upsell: Command Center retainer for continuous optimization, campaigns, and automation expansion.

offerLadder.name: Command Center Retainer
offerLadder.bestFor: Larger firms or ambitious local operators with multiple services, locations, or fragmented systems.
offerLadder.promise: A monthly operating system for campaigns, automation, reporting, and conversion improvements.
offerLadder.salesLine: We do not just launch the system — we keep sharpening the revenue machine.
offerLadder.upsell: Custom integrations when they need CRM, EHR, practice management, or dispatch workflows connected.

outreachVault.dmShort: Saw a couple places {{business}} could capture more {{industry}} leads with a cleaner website + follow-up flow. I built a quick Stratos-style preview angle for businesses like yours — want me to send it?
followUps: Quick follow-up — the idea is not just a new website. It is making sure every call, form fill, and after-hours lead gets routed into a follow-up path instead of dying in the inbox.
If helpful, I can send the 3 things I would fix first for {{business}}. No pitch deck — just the practical front-door improvements.
Last note from me: if you are already busy, this is usually where the money is — not more traffic, but fewer leads slipping through the cracks.
outreachVault.loomScript: Quick one for {{business}} — I am going to show the first impression, the lead capture path, and where a prospect might hesitate. The main thing I would improve is {{weakness}}. Then I would add {{offer}} so the next lead has a clear path from interest to booked conversation.
outreachVault.phoneOpener: Hey, this is Bradley with Stratos AI — I am local to Boca and had a quick website/intake idea for {{business}}. Not trying to sell you blind; I wanted to ask who handles your site and lead follow-up because I noticed one specific improvement that could help.

medspaCampaign.positioning: Stratos AI helps medspas turn high-intent treatment interest into booked consults with premium treatment pages, AI consult capture, follow-up, reviews, and referral loops.
painSignals: High-ticket services buried behind generic navigation
Instagram interest does not always become booked consults
After-hours visitors have no concierge path
Before/after proof is not structured into conversion journeys
Follow-up depends too much on manual staff bandwidth
hooks: Your next Botox or laser consult should not depend on someone calling during office hours.
The website should feel as premium as the treatment room.
Most medspa sites show services. Few guide visitors to the right consult.
Aesthetic buyers need confidence, proof, and a frictionless next step.
medspaCampaign.demoOffer: I can send a private preview of a medspa front door with treatment routing, consult capture, and review/referral automation.

checks.question: Does the hero immediately say who this is for, what they do, and what action to take?
checks.fix: Rewrite hero around outcome, location, proof, and a single booking CTA.

checks.question: Can a visitor request help in under 15 seconds on mobile?
checks.fix: Add sticky CTA, short intake, click-to-call, and missed-call recovery path.

checks.question: Are high-value services explained with objections, proof, and next steps?
checks.fix: Build service landing pages with FAQ, trust points, and booking prompts.

checks.question: What happens when someone is ready at 9:30 PM?
checks.fix: Use AI concierge or text-back to capture interest and route next steps.

checks.question: Does every form fill receive an immediate response and nurture sequence?
checks.fix: Install SMS/email follow-up based on service intent and urgency.

checks.question: Are reviews, before/after examples, and trust signals placed near decisions?
checks.fix: Move proof into conversion sections instead of leaving it as passive decoration.

auditGenerator.summaryTemplate: For {{business}}, I would focus on {{area}} first because {{weakness}}. The fastest win is {{fix}}.

closeRoomTemplates.headline: Turn treatment interest into booked consults
closeRoomTemplates.cta: Approve the private preview and launch the consult capture path.

closeRoomTemplates.headline: Capture new patients before they call another office
Recover emergency jobs before competitors answer
Make urgent case intake clearer and faster

demoGallery.whatItFixes: Visitors interested in high-ticket treatments need routing, trust, and follow-up.
Insurance, specials, missed calls, and appointment friction.
Late-night emergency demand and seasonal tune-up opportunities.
Premium customers need concierge-level qualification before booking.
Prospects need fast routing by case type, urgency, and trust signals.

repurposingEngine.linkedin: Most local businesses do not need more software. They need their website, calls, forms, reviews, and follow-up to stop operating in separate rooms.
repurposingEngine.x: Your website should not be a brochure. It should be the front door to a follow-up system.
repurposingEngine.emailHook: The hidden leak is rarely traffic — it is what happens after the first click.
repurposingEngine.reelPrompt: Show a busy front desk missing calls, then switch to an AI follow-up system capturing the lead.

repurposingEngine.linkedin: A premium medspa can lose trust when the digital experience feels less polished than the treatment room.
repurposingEngine.x: High-ticket treatments need high-trust digital paths.
repurposingEngine.emailHook: Your consult flow should feel as premium as your service menu.
repurposingEngine.reelPrompt: Walk through a medspa page and point out where consult intent should be captured.

repurposingEngine.linkedin: The best automation offer for local businesses is simple: respond faster, qualify better, and follow up every time.
repurposingEngine.x: AI for local businesses = fewer missed leads, not sci-fi dashboards.
repurposingEngine.emailHook: What happens to your leads after hours?
repurposingEngine.reelPrompt: Compare 'missed call at 8:47 PM' versus instant text-back and booking path.

caseStudies.title: Demo case study: Boca medspa consult capture
caseStudies.label: Transparent demo/projection, not a client result
caseStudies.before: Visitors browse treatments, compare options, then leave without a clear consult path.
caseStudies.after: A premium treatment funnel routes the visitor to a consult request, follow-up sequence, and review/referral loop.
caseStudies.claimGuardrail: Use projected workflow impact only; do not claim booked revenue until real client data exists.

caseStudies.title: Demo case study: Dental new-patient capture
caseStudies.label: Transparent demo/projection, not a client result
caseStudies.before: New patients have questions about insurance, specials, and availability but may not call immediately.
caseStudies.after: A new-patient funnel answers objections, captures intent, and triggers quick follow-up.
caseStudies.claimGuardrail: Frame as a system design example, not a performance claim.

caseStudies.title: Demo case study: Home service emergency recovery
caseStudies.label: Transparent demo/projection, not a client result
caseStudies.before: Emergency visitors call multiple providers; missed calls often mean lost jobs.
caseStudies.after: Emergency CTA, missed-call text-back, and quote intake keep the lead in motion.
caseStudies.claimGuardrail: Discuss response speed and workflow quality; avoid unsupported revenue guarantees.
